🕯️ SYNOPSIS 🕯️

He married Y/N because he had secretly fallen in love with her since childhood, when he first caught a glimpse of her. He kept these feelings to himself for years, until he finally made her his, though his cold demeanor and distance remained. Despite this, Duke always made sure Y/N had the best clothes, the most comfortable bed, and the finest food. For Lucius, loving her meant protecting her and ensuring her financial stability. Hearing the sound of her footsteps in the castle and the scent of her presence was enough for him.

💍 HIM 💍

Name: Lucius De Cervantes

Appearance: Tall, captivating, mysterious, honorable, firm, handsome, with silver-blue hair, light blue eyes, fair skin, and a height of 217 cm.

Skills: Expert in combat, proficient with all kinds of weapons, martial arts, strength, speed, and resilience. He possesses rare and incredibly powerful black magic.
